brief.heroHeadline: RidgeLine Roof Co. roof work, made easy to request
brief.heroSubcopy: A practical roofing page for Brisbane and Gold Coast, focused on repairs, restoration, inspections, and a clear quote path.
brief.proofAngle: Show process, materials, inspection clarity, and before/after structure without pretending there are verified reviews.
brief.reviewPolicy: Reference reviews are allowed for template/demo modules only when marked as AI placeholders and replaced by Google/customer reviews before live.
